text: I feel a stirring sense of curiosity as I enter this room glowing with blue neon light beyond sleek glass. The environment is modern, almost futuristic, yet invites me to slow my pace and observe. Inside, the R+D space hums with silent stories—displays and wall texts remind me how our quest for meaning is intertwined with the evolution of our tools. Familiar yet strange technologies look back at me like relics from a future past. Here, I am both participant and witness, feeling small before the grand arc of innovation yet quietly connected to every other soul who has stood and wondered in similar spaces.
